component.name: Nova Browser
component.summary: Lightweight browser with shortcuts, bookmarks, and themes

description.p: Nova Browser is a lightweight cross-platform web browser for desktop Linux and Android. The Linux build uses WebKitGTK with a shared home screen for website shortcuts, bookmarks, and customizable themes.
Features include multi-tab browsing, White/Black/Space/Custom themes, and one-tap bookmark saving.
Multi-tab browsing on Linux and Android, improved toolbar contrast, and star app icon.
